summary:
Post-Infective Glomerulonephritis does not typically present with features characteristic of Nephrotic Syndrome compared to Minimal Change Disease, Focal Segmental Glomerulosclerosis or Membranoproliferative Glomerulonephritis which do exhibit these symptoms prominently based on current medical understanding supported by multiple scholarly sources reviewed here today.
The summary highlights how Agent2 concluded through reviewing additional information that among the specified diseases, only Post-Infectious Glomerulonephritis is less likely to cause Nephrotic Syndrome due to its different pathological presentation focusing more on acute inflammation-related issues instead of chronic damage leading to severe protein loss typical for others included. 

Key Points Summarized In Two Sentences For Clarity And Precision To Answer Given Question Directly Are As Follows :

Post-Infectious Glomerulonephritis usually doesn't develop into Nephrotic Syndrome because it causes mainly inflammatory changes unlike Minimal Change Disease, FSGS & MPGN known for their role in producing high levels of urinary proteins associated with swelling etc., making PI-GN stand out distinctly regarding absence thereof despite being part same category broadly termed 'glomerular' agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Post-Infective Glomerulonephritis does not typically present with features characteristic of Nephrotic Syndrome compared to Minimal Change Disease, Focal Segmental Glomerulosclerosis or Membranoproliferative Glomerulonephritis which do exhibit these symptoms prominently based on current medical understanding supported by multiple scholarly sources reviewed here today.
The summary highlights how Agent2 concluded through reviewing additional information that among the specified diseases, only Post-Infectious Glomerulonephritis is less likely to cause Nephrotic Syndrome due to its different pathological presentation focusing more on acute inflammation-related issues instead of chronic damage leading to severe protein loss typical for others included.
